name: cuebird
description: Deadline-aware Codex. Turn project checkpoints into verified Apple Reminders and resume with saved context.

interface.shortDescription: Project reminders that bring their context back
interface.longDescription: Cuebird notices actionable checkpoints, creates verified Apple Reminders, and keeps a local journal so Codex can resume the work later.
defaultPrompt: Remind me about this project's next checkpoint.
Resume the work from a reminder that fired.
